sources.exact_document_title: Diabetic eye screening pathway requirements specification
sources.version: NHS England diabetic eye screening pathway requirements; updated 16 April 2025
sources.population: People eligible for the NHS diabetic eye screening programme, including pathway-specific pregnancy and surveillance groups.
sources.clinical_setting: End-to-end diabetic eye screening, grading, result communication, surveillance and referral pathways.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for selected screening-result, visual-acuity, image-grading, result-letter, surveillance and referral-status documentation. It does not independently interpret an individual result or apply directly to UAE screening intervals.

exact_sections.heading: End-to-end pathway and information sharing
exact_sections.locator: End-to-end pathway; section 1 Before screening test
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording eligibility, attendance, prior pathway status, information sharing and coordination with primary care, diabetology, hospital eye and maternity services.

exact_sections.heading: Screening test, grading and result communication
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording bilateral visual acuity, image status, grading, screening outcome and result letters sent to the person and relevant clinicians.

exact_sections.heading: Surveillance and hospital-eye-service pathway
exact_sections.locator: section 2 Screening test; surveillance and referral requirements
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording clinician-confirmed surveillance, ungradable-image, digital-surveillance or hospital-eye-service referral status without autonomously assigning a grade or destination.
